runLimitEnforcedBy: grader (per-solution count in grading/.runstate/; refuses with exit 3 after the limit). Agents are also told the limit in their prompt.
promotionRule: the agent overwrites best.py only if the new correct result improves at least 2 of 3 metrics (runtime_s, peak_memory_kb, loc). memory and loc are exact (improved = strictly lower); runtime is improved only if it is more than runtimeTolerancePct lower than the incumbent - a difference within +/-runtimeTolerancePct is a tie, neither better nor worse. The grader reports the MEDIAN runtime over measureRepeats (not the min), so re-grading to chase a lucky low cannot win.
